Container.Name: abed
Container.Overview: Slack bot for movie/TV show requests with Radarr/Sonarr approval workflow. Users run /movie or /tv commands in Slack, select from search results, and approvers can approve or reject requests. Uses Socket Mode — no ports required.
Container.Description: Slack bot for movie/TV show requests with Radarr/Sonarr approval workflow. Uses Socket Mode — no ports required.

Config.Name: Slack Bot Token
Config.Description: Bot User OAuth Token (starts with xoxb-)

Config.Name: Slack App Token
Config.Description: App-Level Token for Socket Mode (starts with xapp-)

Config.Name: Slack Request Channel ID
Config.Description: Channel ID where users make requests (starts with C)

Config.Name: Slack Approval Channel ID
Config.Description: Channel ID where approval messages appear (starts with C)

Config.Name: Approver Slack IDs
Config.Description: Comma-separated Slack user IDs who can approve requests (e.g. U123ABC,U456DEF)

Config.Name: Radarr API Key
Config.Description: Radarr API key from Settings > General

Config.Name: Radarr Quality Profile ID
Config.Description: Numeric ID of the Radarr quality profile (get from /api/v3/qualityProfile)

Config.Name: Radarr Root Folder Path
Config.Description: Root folder path configured in Radarr (e.g. /movies)

Config.Name: DB Path
Config.Description: SQLite database file path inside the container

Config.Name: Sonarr URL
Config.Description: [Optional — set all 4 Sonarr fields or none] Sonarr base URL (e.g. http://192.168.1.100:8989)

Config.Name: Sonarr API Key
Config.Description: [Optional — set all 4 Sonarr fields or none] Sonarr API key from Settings > General

Config.Name: Sonarr Quality Profile ID
Config.Description: [Optional — set all 4 Sonarr fields or none] Numeric ID of the Sonarr quality profile

Config.Name: Sonarr Root Folder Path
Config.Description: [Optional — set all 4 Sonarr fields or none] Root folder path configured in Sonarr (e.g. /tv)
